positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The foreground features abstracted peaks and stylized trees, rendered in clean, sharp lines, giving a negative space aesthetic. The color palette is warm and cool, dominated by deep indigo blues, burnt orange, soft lavender, and golden yellow. Composition is centered, with the mountain range occupying the upper two-thirds, creating a striking, high-contrast silhouette suitable for screen printing on fabric. Flat graphic design style, vector art quality, highly detailed, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, grain, photorealistic, complex shading, dirty, graffiti, clutter
